recommendations.detail: 'rajendranagar_location' has only 2.0 conversions — likely stuck in learning limited. Merging with 'shamshabad_location' (2.0 conv) gives 4.0 combined conversions to exit learning phase.
recommendations.action: Merge with 'shamshabad_location' to pool conversion data. This helps smart bidding exit learning limited and optimize more effectively.
recommendations.expected_impact: Faster exit from learning limited -> better bid optimization -> lower CPL
recommendations.execution_note: Merge keywords into the higher-converting ad group, pause the weaker one

recommendations.detail: QS spread of 3 (min 7, max 10) across 6 keywords. Low-QS keywords drag down ad rank and inflate CPC for the entire ad group.
recommendations.action: Segregate into two ad groups: (1) High-QS group (amara deevyashakti, amara rajendra nagar, deevyashakti amara) (2) Low-QS group (deevyashakti, amara gaganpahad, deevyashakti amara rajendra nagar) — write dedicated ad copy for each to improve ad relevance and expected CTR.
recommendations.expected_impact: QS improvement of 1-2 pts on low-QS keywords, leading to lower CPC and better IS
recommendations.execution_note: Requires manual keyword migration and new ad copy creation
